## The problem

<!--
What workflow are you trying to do today that mcp-qlikview makes
difficult or impossible? Concrete is better than abstract: an example
SQL or MCP tool call you'd want to write goes a long way.
-->

## Proposed change

<!--
A specific addition: a new tool, a field on a return type, an env var.
If you have a strong opinion on the shape, sketch it. If not, describe
the outcome and let the spec author decide.
-->

## Why this fits the spec

The spec scopes v1 narrowly. Read `docs/specs/2026-04-23-mcp-qlikview-design.md`
§13 ("Out of scope") before opening — if your feature is listed there,
it's intentionally excluded for v1. You can still propose it for v2,
but the bar is "concrete user demand + minimal scope creep".

- [ ] I read §13 and my proposal is not explicitly out of scope.
- [ ] My proposal does not introduce a network listener, multi-user
      auth, or write-back to QVW files.

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds did you try? -->
